creator: ahicks@p-o.co.uk
text:
Attached patch upgrades mail/dbmail from 2.2.17 to 3.0.2

I'm also happy to take the port.

The UPDATING message is still relevant:-

dbmail-3.0 is now available

There are a number of significant changes including Dependencies,
Config, Schema and Server changes.

Without these change, dbmail will not run and you will
no longer have access to your emails. See UPGRADING for details.

Don't forget to backup and fully test before upgrading.

To keep version 2.2.17 run:
# portupgrade -o mail/dbmail-22 mail/dbmail
or
# portmaster -o mail/dbmail-22 mail/dbmail

Regards,
Alan
